## ItemsListInjectionMixin class

Mixin to facilitate providing and injecting a list of list items. Injected list is available at `injectedListItems`<!-- -->, and the provided list should be stored in `items`<!-- -->.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
export declare class ItemsListInjectionMixin extends Vue 
```
<b>Extends:</b> Vue
